exercises.name: Plate Loaded Bench Press
exercises.notes: Hold — 4x5 at RPE 8 last time (72kg, you were a hair short of 72.5 on plates). Lock in 4x5 at RPE<=7 before adding. Cut = retention, holding is a win.

exercises.name: Leg Press 45
exercises.notes: Hold — 3x12 at RPE 9. Get all 3 sets at RPE<=8 before adding (knee-friendly, partial ROM).

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Hold — 3x10 at RPE 10 last time, this is your hardest lift right now. Stay at 20kg, chase clean reps not load.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: First logged session in this slot (replaced Tricep Pushdown). Conservative start at 10kg. Strict form, slight lean forward, lead with elbows. If 3x15 feels RPE<=7, go 12.5kg next time.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Hold — 12/15/15 at RPE 8. Get 3x15 clean before adding. Kneeling, facing the stack.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: Up 2.5kg — 3x12 at RPE 8 on 22kg last time, top of range so progressing. Permanent last exercise.
